cases.text: A caller claiming to be from the bank made her share the one time code, then emptied the account
He set up a fake trading application and lured victims to deposit money
Someone used my stolen credentials to authorise a payment
A ring of operators ran dozens of rented accounts to move stolen funds
She was tricked into transferring money for a promised refund that never came
A man pretended to be a police officer on a video call and demanded a fine
Impersonating my cousin online, the fraudster asked for urgent money
After a phishing message my net banking password was captured
A parcel scam caller demanded a customs clearance charge
The gang laundered proceeds through a chain of go-between accounts
My biometric details were cloned to withdraw money
A fake officer over a call threatened arrest unless money was sent
An app cloned my identity and opened accounts in my name
I was deceived into paying an advance for a job that did not exist
Crypto scheme operators posed as advisors and took deposits
A reset link stole my banking login after I clicked it
The syndicate coordinated withdrawals across many mule accounts
A stranger posed as a delivery agent to extract the verification code
Fraudsters deceived an elderly man into sending money to a fake charity
Using a spoofed number they pretended to be a government official
Unauthorised access wiped and transferred funds from the account
